Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Locuziùn verbala cun verb transitiv e complement reflexiv implicit
Figurative Meaning: Agir be in favur da seis interess persunals
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Expressiun alpina ligada a muglins d'aua engiadinais e la distribiziun da forza idraulica
First Example Sentence: Il cusglier cumünal tira adüna l'aua sün seis muglin cur chi's discuorra dal büdschet.
Second Example Sentence: Els han refüsà il proget perquai cha minchün tiraiva l'aua sün seis muglin.
Third Example Sentence: Scha tü lessast güdar il cumün, nu dessast tü be tirar l'aua sün teis muglin.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Construcziun verbala cun verb auxiliar e locuziun preposiziunala
Figurative Meaning: As masdar dapertuot e vulair savair tuot
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Idiom popular in vals rumantschas per persunas chi's masdan in affars esters
First Example Sentence: Mia sour ha adüna il nas in tuot e sa tuot avant ils oters.
Second Example Sentence: Il vegl chantunier avaiva il nas in tuot chi capitaiva i'l cumün.
Third Example Sentence: Nu metter teis nas in tuot schi nu t'ha ingün dumandà.

Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Deriva da l'architectura tradiziunala chantunala e da la simbolica da chantun e chantunada
First Example Sentence: El fa adüna d'üna müra ün chantun scha alch nu va sco previs.
Second Example Sentence: La gasetta ha fat d'üna müra ün chantun pervi d'ün pitschen sbagl administrativ.
Third Example Sentence: Nu fetscha d'üna müra ün chantun e discuorra calmamaing cun tia collega.

Idiom: Ir cul chau tras il mür
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Construcziun verbala figurativa cun preposiziun locativa
Figurative Meaning: Essar testard e vulair cuntinuar malgrà obstachels
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Immaginaziun alpina da persunas chi prouvan da rumper barriers fisicas
First Example Sentence: Il giuven va cul chau tras il mür e nu taidla ingün cussagl.
Second Example Sentence: Ella es ida cul chau tras il mür per realisar seis affar.
Third Example Sentence: Scha nus giain cul chau tras il mür, pudaina perder buns partenaris.

Idiom: Tschertar la vacha naira illa stalla stüra
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Locuziun verbala cun infinitiv e sintagma local
Figurative Meaning: Perder temp cun tschertar quai chi nun es quasi chattabel
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Inspirà da stablas engiadinaisas sainza glüm electica in temps passats
Phonetic Transcription (IPA, Romansh Val: /tʃerˈtar la ˈvatʃa ˈnajra ila ˈstala ˈstyra/
First Example Sentence: Tü tscherchast la vacha naira illa stalla stüra scha prouvas da satisfar a tuots.
Second Example Sentence: Ils istorikers han dit cha quai füss sco tschertar la vacha naira illa stalla stüra.
Third Example Sentence: Eu nu vögl plü tschertar la vacha naira illa stalla stüra cun quistas teorias absurdas.

Idiom: Avair ün crap sün il cour
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: La simbolica dal crap sco pais emoziunal es derasada in tuot l'arc alpin
First Example Sentence: Daspö la dispitta ha ella ün crap sün il cour.
Second Example Sentence: Eu n'haiva ün crap sün il cour cur cha meis figl es parti a l'exteriur.
Third Example Sentence: Scha tü nu discuorras da teis problems, restarà il crap sün teis cour.

Idiom: Tegner la lingua davous ils daints
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Frasa verbala cun infinitiv e complement local
Figurative Meaning: Nu dir quai chi's pensa per evitar problems
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Associà cun normas socialas da discreziun in pitschnas cumünanzas alpinas
First Example Sentence: Durant la radunanza ha'l stuvü tegner la lingua davous ils daints.
Second Example Sentence: Ella nu sa tegner la lingua davous ils daints cur ch'ella vezza ün'ingiustia.
Third Example Sentence: Savais tü tegner la lingua davous ils daints fin cha nus vaivna plü infuormaziuns?

Idiom: Dar vinavant sco ün chantun sainza glüna
Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Comparaziun idiomatica cun adverb da maniera
Figurative Meaning: As mover o agir sainza orientaziun
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Referenza a nots alpinas stüras sainza glüm da glüna
Phonetic Transcription (IPA, Romansh Val: /dar vinaˈvant sko yn tʃanˈtun ˈsajntsa ˈglyna/
First Example Sentence: Il nouv manager dà vinavant sco ün chantun sainza glüna.
Second Example Sentence: Davo la müdada politica, blers vaivan dat vinavant sco ün chantun sainza glüna.
Third Example Sentence: Nu da vinavant sco ün chantun sainza glüna e legia bain las instrucziuns.

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Frasa verbala metaforica cun complement preposiziunal
Figurative Meaning: Far ün gest superficial per zuppar ün problem
Non-Idiomatic Equivalent: Far be ün pitschen solliev temporar
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: L'expressiun deriva da metter grass o charin sün plajas illa medischina populara
First Example Sentence: La refuorma metta be charin sün la plaja sainza schoglier il problem.
Second Example Sentence: Els han pruvà da metter charin sün la plaja cun promischiuns vidas.
Third Example Sentence: Scha nus cuntinuain uschea, mettaina charin sün la plaja empè da sanar il sistem.

Idiom: Esser sco ün chantun al vent
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Immaginaziun da chantunas e fanellas expostas al vent da muntogna
First Example Sentence: El es sco ün chantun al vent e müda opiniun mincha di.
Second Example Sentence: Ils investiders d'eiraivan sco ün chantun al vent dürant la crisa.
Third Example Sentence: Nu sta esser sco ün chantun al vent schi vain critica.
